arts.ttl: Rennes predicted XI v Marseille: Seko Fofana set for first start, Brice Samba set for debut
arts.sum: Having come off the bench last week to make his Stade Rennais debut during the 3-2 defeat to OGC Nice, Seko Fofana is expected to make his first start when Les…

arts.ttl: Man City agree £33.6m deal for Lens defender Khusanov
arts.sum: Manchester City agree £33.6m deal with Lens for Uzbekistan central defender Abdukodir Khusanov.

arts.ttl: Abdukodir Khusanov: Man City medical tests 'approved' after agreeing £33.5m deal with Lens
arts.sum: Lens defender Abdukodir Khusanov is reportedly given permission to undergo a medical at Man City after a €40m (£33.5m) deal was agreed between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: Sources: City agree deal for 20yo CB Khusanov
arts.sum: Manchester City are closing in on the signing of defender Abdukodir Khusanov after reaching an agreement with RC Lens, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Will Still confirms Abdukodir Khusanov’s impending move to Manchester City
arts.sum: Racing Club de Lens manager Will Still was up front about an impending departure for centre-back Abdukodir Khusanov (20 ) in his pre-match press conference ahead of the Sang &…

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Pep Guardiola makes stance on new signings crystal clear amid Omar Marmoush, Abdukodir Khusanov, Vitor Reis links
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola makes his feelings "clear" over potential incomings and outgoings at the Etihad Stadium during the January transfer window.
